title: How do I make my "bind interface" take effect in all instances?

features.name: bind interface to module (not instance)
features.description: Code should include a bind statement targeting a module name rather than a specific instance, where the module has multiple instances

features.name: interface with embedded class containing task
features.description: Code should include an interface that contains an embedded class with a task method accessing hierarchical paths

features.name: multiple module instances with bind targeting module
features.description: Code should include multiple instances of a module where a bind statement targets the module name (not specific instance), expecting all instances to receive the bound interface

features.name: unpacked array write via class task in interface
features.description: Code should include a register unpacked array accessed through a class task method within an interface, where the task writes to the array via hierarchical reference
